name: Davie County Community Park
description: Davie County Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Mocksville, NC. There are 5 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Davie Family YMCA
description: Davie Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Mocksville, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.

name: Mocksville Elementary School
description: Mocksville Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mocksville, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Thousand Trails - Forest Lake
description: Come play pickleball at Thousand Trails - Forest Lake in Advance, NC! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, food, and lights.
